narrative:
Richland Township has 1,014 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points.
